pageSubtitle: Process control, sensor tech, and allied M.Tech branch strategies for GATE IN.
bannerText: Connect with IN mentors working at BARC, ONGC, or pursuing control systems at IIT Bombay.

topics.title: M.Tech Admissions (Interdisciplinary)
topics.description: Leveraging GATE IN for top EE/ECE specializations.
points: IN students can apply for Control Systems, Applied Optics, and Biomedical programs.
Check eligibility criteria carefully—some EE/ECE programs accept IN scores.
Microelectronics and VLSI are available to IN students at select IITs.

topics.title: PSU & Core Job Interviews
topics.description: Cracking ONGC, IOCL, GAIL, and BARC interviews.
points: Focus heavily on Process Control, PID tuning, and Transducers.
Be ready to design measurement bridges and op-amp signal conditioning circuits.

topics.title: SOP & Research (MS/Ph.D.)
topics.description: Proposals for Sensors, IoT, and Control Engineering.
points: Highlight hands-on experience with microcontrollers (Arduino, STM32, PLC).
Align research interests with smart sensors, robotics, or automation.
Keep the SOP concise and technical.

topics.title: Written Tests & Screenings
points: Network Theory and Analog Electronics are major components.
Brush up on Engineering Math (especially Laplace transforms and Matrices).
Be prepared for circuit analysis on a whiteboard.
